growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner
catalysts_general: Discovery: Adobe is showing real monetization from AI, with Q2 revenue of $6.62 billion and AI-driven recurring revenue above $500 million across Creative Cloud and Acrobat.

growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner

growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner

growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner
catalysts_general: Discovery: Constellation Energy is roughly 39% below its 52-week high, with the Aug. 6 earnings call as the next catalyst after a strong Q1 and continued AI-power demand; the bear case is that Calpine integration, leverage, and capex keep the multiple pinned.

growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner
catalysts_general: Discovery: Intuit is more than 66% below its 52-week high, yet the 17% workforce reduction, $8B buyback, and Aug. 20 earnings create a concrete margin-repair setup; AI tax competition and soft tax-season expectations remain the risk.

growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner
catalysts_general: Discovery: Benzinga showed a bullish September 18, 2026 $205 call sweep in NVDA for 4,037 contracts, and a separate August 21, 2026 $210 call trade for 300 contracts carrying about $572.7K of premium, which points to repeated upside flow in a mega-cap leader.

growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner
catalysts_general: Discovery: Autodesk is roughly 37% off its 52-week high, and the Aug. 27 earnings report should show whether the direct-sales reset and MaintainX acquisition are turning into durable billings growth; integration risk and AI workflow competition are the bear case.

growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner
catalysts_general: Discovery: Salesforce has fallen about 41% from its 52-week high, but today’s KeyBanc downgrade, the $50B buyback/ASR signal, and Sep. 2 earnings give a real catalyst stack; the bear case is that Agentforce still has not proven durable monetization.

growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner

growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner
catalysts_general: Discovery: ServiceNow is still down sharply in 2026, but it just got an analyst upgrade and has a July 22 earnings date that could reset sentiment on the stock.

growth_picks.source_detail: Independently discovered via web research

growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner

growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner

growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner

growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner

growth_picks.source_detail: Independently discovered via web research

growth_picks.source_detail: Independently discovered via web research

growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner

growth_picks.source_detail: Found by BOTH independent discovery AND scanner

growth_picks.source_detail: Independently discovered via web research

growth_picks.source_detail: Independently discovered via web research
